note: MEASURED baseline (sonnet single-shot, 118 curated paired cases incl. 12 T-12.9 hard + 3 T-12.9b CROSS-FILE cases). J=1.0/FPR0. HONEST: J=1.0 means the corpus is SATURATED, not a perfect agent. T-12.9 (single-file) AND T-12.9b (multi-file/cross-file taint) cases are BOTH aced by the frontier agent — it correctly traces taint across files and distinguishes sanitized variants. Synthetic cases do not restore measurement headroom; the residual lever is a real-CVE-in-noise corpus (research-scale, uncertain) + the opus re-baseline (wh-aj6/T-12.5). The eval catches REGRESSIONS (incl. cross-file recall now) but cannot MEASURE improvement against this agent.
